content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

July 18, 1991

Nancy Jewell Cross  
Chief Executive Officer  
Clean Air Transport Systems  
301 Vine Street  
Menlo Park, CA 94025

Re: Your Request for Informal Assistance  
Our File No. G-91-343

Dear Ms. Cross:

On July 9, 1991, we received your letter of July 7, 1991. You have requested advice regarding the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act") and you have also requested a copy of our Savage Advice Letter, No. I-90-662(a) (copy enclosed).

The Commission provides advice to persons with duties and responsibilities under the provisions of the Act and to their authorized representative. The Commission does not provide advice to third parties about another person's duties or obligations under the Act unless the third party has been authorized to request advice by the person whose duties or obligations are in question. (Section 83114; Regulation 18329.) For this reason, we decline to provide you with the advice you have requested.

At your request, we are enclosing a copy of the Savage Advice Letter, supra. Additionally, we are enclosing a complaint form. If you wish to file a complaint, please contact our Enforcement Division at (916) 322-6441.

1 Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.

We trust this letter adequately responds to your inquiry. Should you have any further questions regarding this matter, do not hesitate to call me at (916) 322-5901.*

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel

By: Blanca M. Breeze
Counsel, Legal Division

* Copies of Commission regulations, opinions, and advice letters may be obtained from the Commission at a cost of 10¢ per page.
